creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I can't reproduce this problem. 
It is possible the submitter has "BATCH" or something simular set, and there 
is a corner case I'm getting wrong.  But a normal build has been tested 
by myself and a few others. 

If this problem still exists after the next CVSup, please submit a PR.
